day_1.speaker: DaVinci
day_1.message: Come on, friend! If you suddenly found yourself with 100 million in your pocket, what wild and amazing thing would you do first? Don’t hold back—let’s hear your boldest, most epic dream! Haha!
day_1.response:
hello, I'm C&C.
thank you for your welcoming.
and if I found 100 million, I would travel all over the world! one of my desire is to travel whole Europe.
and I would take my family and lover.

day_1.speaker: Donatello
day_1.message: Very exciting plan! Now, let's analyze this logically: if you had to allocate that 100 million realistically, how would you divide it among travel expenses, daily living costs, and perhaps saving or investing some of it? What proportions seem most practical to you?
day_1.response:
First of all, i would save money 50% of 100 million.
then, I would invest 1% to 5% of all.
And around 20%, I'd like to use for me. rest of money, perhaps i have to spend for my normal life.

day_1.speaker: Michelangelo
day_1.message: Wow, your dream is so vibrant and full of life! I’m curious—does this dream come from a clear goal you’re aiming for, like ticking off every spot on your Europe map? Or is it more about the feelings and values, like the joy of sharing moments with your family and lover? Art and dreams are both fueled by heart and vision—how about yours?
day_1.response:
thank you for making me think about my trip deeply.
so far, I' thinking about second one which you suggested me.
Because, if I visit all famous place, it'll be so hectic and i won't be able to enjoy enough.
Instead, I wanna spend  wonderful n unforgettable time with my family n lover to make special memories. I'd rather take care of my feeling n value than place.

day_2.speaker: Raffaello
day_2.message: Oh... speaking of sharing and living together, I noticed our shared refrigerator space feels rather cramped lately. I'm not being picky, but the abundance of packaged foods seems to take up quite a bit of room—space that fresh ingredients, perhaps more aligned with a certain quality of life, could better utilize. I suppose we all hope to maintain that same standard of living here, don't we? What are your thoughts on managing our fridge space to preserve a comfortable environment for everyone?
day_2.response:
Once we should hold a meeting to discuss shared space.
I would say some people might have expired things and extra things and so on...
and we should decide about spice. because everyone can use spice, so we shouldn't buy spice for each person.

day_2.speaker: DaVinci
day_2.message: Haha, friend, you’re totally right—the fridge space needs some friendly teamwork and a little give-and-take! How about we shake things up and try rearranging the fridge layout to fit everyone’s fresh and packaged goodies better? What’s your dream setup for the fridge space? Any clever ideas to make it awesome and fair for all of us?
day_2.response:
for me, I would prepare for containers like box one by one for each person.
then, I let them keep food inside that one. if we do properly, we will not be in trouble to filled with food or something in refrigerator.

day_3.speaker: DaVinci
day_3.message: Haha, friend, speaking of making our shared space awesome, guess what? We’re launching a super fun ‘dream room’ project! Donatello is all about the technical stuff, and Michelangelo will jazz it up with artistic vibes! Wanna jump in and share your coolest ideas on how we can make our room the ultimate cozy, creative paradise? Come on, friend, dream big with me!
day_3.response:
From my point of view,  your rooms look very simple. I have several suggestions. First, you should decide the motif of room which is your desire. if I were you, after i would decide theme, i would collect furniture, change wallpaper like that. then, I try to approach that room which i wanna achieve!!
for example, I wanna make room related to sky. and i would change my furniture's color, like sky blue. and i apply wallpaper which cloud and sky are designed...is my suggestion good...?

day_3.speaker: Donatello
day_3.message: Your idea has great potential. Let's analyze this realistically: we need to consider efficient space utilization, the cost of materials for furniture and decoration, and how easy it will be to maintain everything over time. Between these practical factors and the design aesthetics you mentioned, which do you think should take priority in creating the dream room?
day_3.response: In my opinion, first the cost. i think this is the most important.

day_3.speaker: Michelangelo
day_3.message: Wow, art truly needs courage to break conventions and chase that perfect vision! In crafting this dream room, would you be willing to endure some hardship and stretch the budget for that flawless result, or would you rather choose an easier compromise to keep things simple and stress-free?
day_3.response:
ummm...depends on my other work means, i have to give my time to my job during daytime...
but if possible, I'd like to make dream room! when I feel stuck on creating dream room, I try to imagine my desired room(means when i accomplish to make dream room)

day_3.speaker: Michelangelo
day_3.message: Wow, that’s such a heartfelt way to stay motivated! Imagining your dream room as a finished masterpiece—that’s pure artistic fuel! Balancing your daytime job and your dream project shows dedication, and that’s awesome. So, when time and energy allow, will you push through those tough moments for the perfect creation, or take easier steps to keep it manageable? Art is all about choice and courage, my friend. Now, tell me, how do those dreams inspire your daily creativity? Let’s keep that spark alive!
day_3.response:
let's see, I have two things which encourage me.
First, I'm always feeling happy that i have good chances for everything.
second, I wanna make my good future with my love one. and he always encourage me.

day_4.speaker: Raffaello
day_4.message: Oh... speaking of inspiration, last night’s creative activity was indeed lively, but I found myself unable to focus on my own artwork amidst the continuous noise. I’m not being picky, but I had hoped for at least a modicum of mutual respect that would allow us all some quiet. Perhaps my expectations were too high... do you think it’s too much to ask for a shared space where creativity and consideration coexist gracefully?
day_4.response:
For me, you're right. some people prefer stay at the party which many people are. but others don't like.
i also prefer stay silently. so we should keep balance between creativoty and consideration

day_4.speaker: Raffaello
day_4.message: Oh... speaking of last night, it took me quite some time—about an hour—to tidy up the ‘creative garbage’ left in the shared area. I’m not being picky, but we all agreed in the lease to maintain a certain quality in our living environment. Do you think it is... appropriate to leave such remnants behind, or should we perhaps revisit our shared responsibilities to preserve the house’s standards?
day_4.response: oh, sorry to hear that. I bet you all you should recheck n confirm your rules if you wanna keep clean n make comfortable sppace.

day_4.speaker: Donatello
day_4.message: Logically speaking, we need to balance creativity and quality of life to maintain a harmonious living environment. From a practical standpoint, what if we establish a clear schedule with designated activity hours for socializing and creative work, and quiet hours for rest and focus? What allocation of time do you think would be most reasonable to accommodate both energetic expression and peaceful living?
day_4.response:
from my preference, I wanna do creative work in the morning. and if you can, early morning is better.
then, we should spend peaceful time, it's better allocate at night time after you finished all work.

day_5.response:
let's see...
I think i alway appreciate when i meet someone even my family. cause every moment never come back...especially my friends, family, boyfriend i cherish have own lifetime, but they give their time to spend with me. so i always feel happy when i meet important n precious people.

then after i finished, I'm gonna meet sometimes.
